zh.lifeSummary: Catherine Findern於1335年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾易亞斯特 斯塔福爾。她和John I Findern至少有1個兒子。她去世在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾瑟爾卡斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Findern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from Middle High German vinder ‘inventor’, possibly a nickname for a teller of tall stories or a person of great ingenuity.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine Findern was born in 1335, in East Staffordshire, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with John I Findern. She died in Thurcaston, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.Thurcaston, Charnwood, Leicestershire, E: イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアスウルカストン
ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Findernは1335年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエアスト スタフォードシュアイアで生まれた。彼女はJohn I Findernとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアスウルカストンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Findern(은)는 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 이스트 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 John I Findern(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 스르카스턴에서 사망했다.
